attempts.commit_message: fix: resolve Quality Gates CI failure - ruff and mypy errors
attempts.fix_description: Fixed ruff linting errors (set comprehension, exception chaining, deprecated import) and mypy import-not-found errors with proper type ignore comments

attempts.commit_message: fix: resolve ruff format check CI failure
attempts.fix_description: Applied automatic formatting (black, trailing whitespace, end of file newline) to test_infrastructure.py

attempts.commit_message: fix: commit pixi.lock and fix trailing whitespace in CI files
attempts.fix_description: Added missing pixi.lock file with tomli dependency and fixed trailing whitespace in workflow and documentation files

attempts.commit_message: fix: remove Black from pre-commit, use only Ruff for formatting
attempts.fix_description: Removed Black formatter from pre-commit hooks to eliminate conflicts with Ruff format. Ruff is faster and better than Black.

attempts.commit_message: fix: final ruff format consistency for CI
attempts.fix_description: Applied final ruff formatting to match CI environment expectations. Format-check now passes locally.
